betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Ingot Former: Materialize Dusts into Ingots§f

§aThe Ingot Former compresses dusts into ingots at scale.§f
The §bIngot Former§f (`nuclearcraft:ingot_former`) is a §bsingle-block NC machine§f that converts §b§f§citem input + fluid input§f§f into §b§f§cmaterialized ingots§f§f. It is the §b§f§cbackbone machine§f§f for ingot production in NC — used to process dusts, gems, and other materials into standardized §b1× NC ingot forms§f.

§6Crafting Recipe (graph: minecraft.crafting)§f:
Per the JEI graph, the Ingot Former recipe requires:
- §bHopper§f (`minecraft:hopper`)
- §bFerroboron Alloy Ingot§f (`nuclearcraft:alloy:6`)
- §bMachine Chassis§f (`nuclearcraft:part:10`)
- §bTough Alloy Ingot§f (`nuclearcraft:alloy:1`)

§6Function§f:
- §bProcess: materialization§f — converts §bdust + fluid (or dust + dust)§f into §b§f§cingots§f§f.
- §bSlots: 1 item input + 1 fluid input + 1 dust/secondary input§f → §b1 item output + 1 fluid output (often empty)§f.
- §bPower: FE only§f — like other NC machines, no fuel slot.
- §bUpgrades: Speed / Energy§f — both upgrades can be inserted into the UI (see §bSpeed Upgrade§f and §bEnergy Upgrade§f quests).

§6What the Ingot Former Produces§f:
- §b§f§cTough Alloy Ingot§f§f from §bTough Alloy Dust§f + water
- §b§f§cBeryllium Ingot§f§f from §bBeryllium Dust§f
- §b§f§cBoron Ingot§f§f from §bBoron Dust§f
- §b§f§cLithium Ingot§f§f from §bLithium Dust§f
- §b§f§cTungsten Ingot§f§f from §bTungsten Dust§f
- Many more — see `nc/recipe/processor/IngotFormerRecipes.java`

§6Use in the Production Chain§f:
- §bDust → Ingot§f: the §b§f§cprimary use§f§f is converting §b§f§cdust outputs§f§f from §b§f§cCentrifuge§f§f, §b§f§cElectrolyzer§f§f, and §b§f§cOre Leacher (QMD)§f§f into ingot form for §b§f§cfurther crafting§f§f.
- §b§f§cFluid casting§f§f: the §b§f§coptional fluid input§f§f allows recipes like §b§f§cwater + dust → ingot + water§f§f (recycling the fluid).
- §b§f§cSmelting alternative§f§f: many dusts can be smelted in a §b§f§cvanilla furnace§f§f, but the §b§f§cIngot Former§f§f is more efficient and §b§f§cupgradable§f§f.

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bHopper§f → 5 × Iron Ingot + Chest in vanilla crafting
- §bFerroboron Alloy Ingot§f → from §bAlloy Furnace§f using §bFerroboron Alloy Dust§f blends
- §bMachine Chassis§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f using §bSteel Frame§f + §bTough Alloy Ingot§f
- §bTough Alloy Ingot§f → from §bAlloy Furnace§f using §bTough Alloy Dust§f blends

§eTip§f: The §b§f§cIngot Former is the most-used NC machine in mid-game§f§f — it processes §b§f§cEVERY dust output§f§f from your §b§f§cOre Leacher (QMD)§f§f, §b§f§cCentrifuge§f§f, and §b§f§cElectrolyzer§f§f. Build a §b§f§c4-Ingot Former row§f§f with full Speed and Energy upgrades for max throughput.
